commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c40af380578bb94a281f68106c2bad4c92166886)
commands.review_summary:
Adds an xAI realtime voice provider for Talk Gateway relay, registers the xAI `realtimeVoiceProviders` manifest contract, adds provider tests, and updates Talk/xAI docs.

PR surface: Source +949, Tests +430, Docs +60. Total +1439 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a feature PR. The body provides source Gateway catalog proof, but not a live xAI realtime session reproduction of the new bridge behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor/maintainer follow-up for live proof plus two code/package blockers; this is not a safe automated repair lane while real behavior proof remains insufficient.

target.title: feat(xai): add realtime voice provider
target.body:
## Summary
- register xAI as a Talk realtime voice provider through the existing Gateway relay contract
- map xAI/OpenAI-compatible realtime events for audio, transcripts, tool calls, barge-in, and tool-result continuation
- expose live inbound speech transcript updates from `conversation.item.input_audio_transcription.updated` for Talk and meeting transcription surfaces
- document xAI Gateway relay configuration and add `realtimeVoiceProviders` to the xAI manifest contract

## Real behavior proof
Ran the committed branch locally as a real OpenClaw source gateway, isolated from my packaged Gateway:

```bash
OPENCLAW_HOME=/tmp/openclaw-xai-proof.4zbait \
XAI_API_KEY=xai-proof-redacted \
/opt/homebrew/Cellar/node/24.4.1/bin/node scripts/run-node.mjs gateway run \
  --dev --allow-unconfigured --auth none --bind loopback --port 18989
```

Startup proof from that source process:

```text
OpenClaw 2026.6.2 (c40af38)
22:54:26 [gateway] http server listening ... port=18989
22:54:26 [gateway] ready
```

The built source plugin inventory includes the new realtime voice contract:

```json
{
  "id": "xai",
  "status": "loaded",
  "providerIds": ["xai"],
  "speechProviderIds": ["xai"],
  "realtimeTranscriptionProviderIds": ["xai"],
  "realtimeVoiceProviderIds": ["xai"],
  "mediaUnderstandingProviderIds": ["xai"],
  "imageGenerationProviderIds": ["xai"],
  "videoGenerationProviderIds": ["xai"],
  "webSearchProviderIds": ["grok"]
}
```

`talk.catalog` from the isolated gateway shows xAI as a configured realtime Talk provider, using Gateway relay only:

```bash
OPENCLAW_HOME=/tmp/openclaw-xai-proof.4zbait \
/opt/homebrew/Cellar/node/24.4.1/bin/node scripts/run-node.mjs \
  gateway call talk.catalog --url ws://127.0.0.1:18989 --token proof-token --json --params '{}'
```

Relevant response excerpt:

```json
{
  "realtime": {
    "providers": [
      {
        "id": "xai",
        "label": "xAI Grok Voice",
        "configured": true,
        "modes": ["realtime"],
        "brains": ["agent-consult"],
        "supportsBrowserSession": false,
        "defaultModel": "grok-voice-think-fast-1.0",
        "transports": ["gateway-relay"],
        "inputAudioFormats": [
          { "encoding": "g711_ulaw", "sampleRateHz": 8000, "channels": 1 },
          { "encoding": "pcm16", "sampleRateHz": 24000, "channels": 1 }
        ],
        "outputAudioFormats": [
          { "encoding": "g711_ulaw", "sampleRateHz": 8000, "channels": 1 },
          { "encoding": "pcm16", "sampleRateHz": 24000, "channels": 1 }
        ],
        "supportsBargeIn": true,
        "supportsToolCalls": true
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

This proves the built source branch exposes the xAI realtime voice provider through the real Gateway Talk catalog path without changing the existing Talk relay design. The temporary gateway was stopped cleanly after the proof.

## Verification
- `/opt/homebrew/Cellar/node/24.4.1/bin/node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-providers.config.ts xai`
- `/opt/homebrew/Cellar/node/24.4.1/bin/node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions.tsbuildinfo`
- `/opt/homebrew/Cellar/node/24.4.1/bin/node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/xai/index.ts extensions/xai/realtime-voice-provider.ts extensions/xai/realtime-voice-provider.test.ts`
- `/opt/homebrew/Cellar/node/24.4.1/bin/node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/xai/index.ts extensions/xai/realtime-voice-provider.ts extensions/xai/realtime-voice-provider.test.ts`
- `/opt/homebrew/Cellar/node/24.4.1/bin/node scripts/generate-plugin-inventory-doc.mjs --check`
- `/opt/homebrew/Cellar/node/24.4.1/bin/node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check`
- `/opt/homebrew/Cellar/node/24.4.1/bin/node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.plugins.config.ts src/plugins/bundled-capability-metadata.test.ts`
- `/opt/homebrew/Cellar/node/24.4.1/bin/node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.contracts-plugin.config.ts src/plugins/contracts/registry.contract.test.ts`
